info.title: DUST API Documentation
info.description: The OpenAPI specification for the Dust.tt API

tags.name: Private Spaces
tags.description: Private API - Spaces and data source views

get.description: Returns the authenticated user with their workspaces and subscriber hash.

patch.description: Update the authenticated user's profile (name, job type, favorite platforms, image).

400.description: Invalid request body

get.description: Get the agent configurations for the workspace identified by {wId}.

parameters.name: view
parameters.description:
The view to use when retrieving agents:
- all: Retrieves all non-private agents (default if not authenticated)
- list: Retrieves all active agents accessible to the user (default if authenticated)
- published: Retrieves all agents with published scope
- global: Retrieves all global agents
- favorites: Retrieves all agents marked as favorites by the user (only available to authenticated users)

parameters.name: withAuthors
parameters.description: When set to 'true', includes recent authors information for each agent

agentConfigurations.description: Array of agent configurations, optionally including lastAuthors if withAuthors=true

400.description: Bad Request. Missing or invalid parameters.

401.description: Unauthorized. Invalid or missing authentication token, or attempting to access restricted views without authentication.

405.description: Method not supported. Only GET is expected.

get.description: Download the agent configuration identified by {sId} as a YAML file.

200.description: The agent configuration as a downloadable YAML file

400.description: Bad Request. Invalid or missing parameters.

401.description: Unauthorized. Invalid or missing authentication token.

405.description: Method not supported. Only GET is expected.

get.description: Retrieve the agent configuration identified by {sId} in the workspace identified by {wId}.

parameters.name: variant
parameters.description: Configuration variant to retrieve. 'light' returns basic config without actions, 'full' includes complete actions/tools configuration

400.description: Bad Request. Invalid or missing parameters.

401.description: Unauthorized. Invalid or missing authentication token.

405.description: Method not supported. Only GET or PATCH is expected.

patch.description: Update the agent configuration identified by {sId} in the workspace identified by {wId}.

400.description: Bad Request. Invalid or missing parameters.

401.description: Unauthorized. Invalid or missing authentication token.

405.description: Method not supported. Only GET or PATCH is expected.

get.description: Search for agent configurations by name in the workspace identified by {wId}.

parameters.name: q
parameters.description: Search query for agent configuration names

400.description: Bad Request. Invalid or missing parameters.

401.description: Unauthorized. Invalid or missing authentication token.

405.description: Method not supported. Only GET is expected.

post.summary: Cancel message generation in a conversation

messageIds.description: List of message IDs to cancel generation for

success.description: Indicates if the cancellation was successful

400.description: Invalid request (invalid query parameters or request body)

post.description: Create a new content fragment in the workspace identified by {wId}.

400.description: Bad Request. Missing or invalid parameters.

401.description: Unauthorized. Invalid or missing authentication token.

get.summary: Get the events for a conversation
get.description: Get the events for a conversation in the workspace identified by {wId}.

200.description: Events for the conversation, view the "Events" page from this documentation for more information.

400.description: Bad Request. Missing or invalid parameters.

401.description: Unauthorized. Invalid or missing authentication token.

405.description: Method not supported. Only GET is expected.

get.description:
Retrieves all feedback entries for a specific conversation.
Requires authentication and read:conversation scope.

200.description: List of feedback entries for the conversation

messageId.description: ID of the message that received feedback

userId.description: ID of the user who gave feedback

400.description: Invalid request parameters

get.description: Get a conversation in the workspace identified by {wId}.

400.description: Bad Request. Missing or invalid parameters.

401.description: Unauthorized. Invalid or missing authentication token.

405.description: Method not supported. Only GET is expected.

patch.description: Mark a conversation as read in the workspace identified by {wId}.

400.description: Bad Request. Invalid or missing parameters.

401.description: Unauthorized. Invalid or missing authentication token.

405.description: Method not supported. Only GET or PATCH is expected.

get.summary: Get mention suggestions for a conversation
get.description: Get suggestions for mentions (agents and users) based on a query string, scoped to a specific conversation.

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: Search query string to filter suggestions

parameters.name: select
parameters.description: Array of mention types to include. Can be "agents", "users", or both. If not provided, defaults to agents and users.

parameters.name: current
parameters.description: Whether to include the current user in the suggestions.

400.description: Bad Request. Missing or invalid parameters.

401.description: Unauthorized. Invalid or missing authentication token.

405.description: Method not supported. Only GET is expected.

post.summary: Edit an existing message in a conversation

mentions.description: List of agent mentions in the message

configurationId.description: ID of the mentioned agent configuration

agentMessages.description: Optional array of agent messages generated in response

400.description: Invalid request (message not found or not a user message)

get.description: Get events for a message in the workspace identified by {wId}.

parameters.name: lastEventId
parameters.description: ID of the last event received

400.description: Bad Request

post.summary: Submit feedback for a specific message in a conversation
post.description:
Submit user feedback (thumbs up/down) for a specific message in a conversation.
Requires authentication and update:conversation scope.

400.description: Invalid request parameters or body

delete.summary: Delete feedback for a specific message
delete.description:
Delete user feedback for a specific message in a conversation.
Requires authentication and update:conversation scope.

400.description: Invalid request parameters

404.description: Conversation, message or feedback not found

post.summary: Validate an action in a conversation message
post.description: Approves or rejects an action taken in a specific message in a conversation

actionId.description: ID of the action to validate

approved.description: Whether the action is approved or rejected

400.description: Invalid request body

404.description: Conversation, message, or workspace not found

post.description: Create a message in the workspace identified by {wId} in the conversation identified by {cId}.

400.description: Bad Request. Missing or invalid parameters.

401.description: Unauthorized. Invalid or missing authentication token.

post.description: Create a new conversation in the workspace identified by {wId}.

contentFragments.description: The list of content fragments to attach to this conversation (optional)

skipToolsValidation.description: Whether to skip the tools validation of the agent messages triggered by this user message (optional, defaults to false)

blocking.description: Whether to wait for the agent to generate the initial message. If true the query will wait for the agent's answer. If false (default), the API will return a conversation ID directly and you will need to use streaming events to get the messages.

spaceId.description: The sId of the space (project) in which to create the conversation (optional). If not provided, the conversation is created outside projects

400.description: Bad Request

post.description:
Parses pasted text containing @ mentions and converts them to the proper mention format.
Matches @agentName or @userName patterns against available agents and users.

markdown.description: Markdown text containing @ mentions to parse

200.description: Parsed markdown with mentions converted to proper format

markdown.description: Processed markdown text with mentions converted to serialized format

400.description: Bad Request. Missing or invalid request body.

401.description: Unauthorized. Invalid or missing authentication token.

405.description: Method not supported. Only POST is expected.

get.description: Get suggestions for mentions (agents and users) based on a query string.

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: Search query string to filter suggestions

parameters.name: select
parameters.description: Array of mention types to include. Can be "agents", "users", or both. If not provided, defaults to agents and users.

parameters.name: current
parameters.description: Whether to include the current user in the suggestions.

400.description: Bad Request. Missing or invalid parameters.

401.description: Unauthorized. Invalid or missing authentication token.

405.description: Method not supported. Only GET is expected.

fileSize.description: Size of the file in bytes

useCase.description: Intended use case for the file, use "conversation"

useCaseMetadata.description: (optional) Metadata for the use case, for conversation useCase should be dictionary with conversationId stringified

sId.description: Unique string identifier for the file

400.description: Invalid request or unsupported file type

post.summary: Update heartbeat for a client-side MCP server
post.description:
[Documentation](https://docs.dust.tt/docs/client-side-mcp-server)
Update the heartbeat for a previously registered client-side MCP server.
This extends the TTL for the server registration.

serverId.description: The ID of the registered MCP server

400.description: Bad Request. Missing or invalid parameters.

401.description: Unauthorized. Invalid or missing authentication token.

403.description: Forbidden. User does not have access to the workspace.

404.description: Not Found. MCP server not registered or expired.

post.description:
[Documentation](https://docs.dust.tt/docs/client-side-mcp-server)
Register a client-side MCP server to Dust.
The registration is scoped to the current user and workspace.
A serverId identifier is generated and returned in the response.

400.description: Bad Request. Missing or invalid parameters.

401.description: Unauthorized. Invalid or missing authentication token.

403.description: Forbidden. User does not have access to the workspace.

get.summary: Stream MCP tool requests for a workspace
get.description:
[Documentation](https://docs.dust.tt/docs/client-side-mcp-server)
Server-Sent Events (SSE) endpoint that streams MCP tool requests for a workspace.
This endpoint is used by client-side MCP servers to listen for tool requests in real-time.
The connection will remain open and events will be sent as new tool requests are made.

parameters.name: serverId
parameters.description: ID of the MCP server to filter events for

parameters.name: lastEventId
parameters.description: ID of the last event to filter events for

200.description:
Connection established successfully. Events will be streamed in Server-Sent Events format.
Each event will contain a tool request that needs to be processed by the MCP server.

400.description: Bad Request. Missing or invalid parameters.

401.description: Unauthorized. Invalid or missing authentication token.

403.description: Forbidden. You don't have access to this workspace or MCP server.

post.description:
[Documentation](https://docs.dust.tt/docs/client-side-mcp-server)
Endpoint for client-side MCP servers to submit the results of tool executions.
This endpoint accepts the output from tools that were executed locally.

result.description: The result data from the tool execution

serverId.description: ID of the MCP server submitting the results

400.description: Bad Request. Missing or invalid parameters.

401.description: Unauthorized. Invalid or missing authentication token.

403.description: Forbidden. You don't have access to this workspace or MCP server.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Number of results per page (1-100, default 25)

parameters.name: viewType
parameters.description: Type of view to filter results

parameters.name: spaceIds

400.description: Bad request

includeDataSources.description: List of data source IDs to include in search

viewType.description: Type of view to filter results

spaceIds.description: List of space IDs to search in

nodeIds.description: List of specific node IDs to search

400.description: Bad request

post.description: Download and upload a file from a tool (MCP server) to Dust

externalId.description: The external ID of the file in the tool

serverName.description: Optional name of the MCP server (e.g., "Notion", "GitHub")

serverIcon.description: Optional icon identifier for the MCP server

400.description: Bad request

post.description: Create and execute a run for an app in the space specified by {spaceId}.

parameters.name: wId
parameters.description: Unique string identifier for the workspace

stream.description: If true, the response will be streamed

blocking.description: If true, the request will block until the run is complete

block_filter.description: Array of block names to filter the response

400.description: Bad Request. Missing or invalid parameters.

401.description: Unauthorized. Invalid or missing authentication token.

400.description: Invalid request body

403.description: Unauthorized - Only admins or builders can administrate spaces

500.description: Internal server error - The data source view cannot be updated

401.description: Unauthorized - The data source view is in use and cannot be deleted

403.description: Forbidden - Only admins or builders can delete data source views

get.summary: Check the upsert queue status for a data source
get.description: Returns the number of running document upsert workflows for this data source. This endpoint is only accessible with system API keys (e.g., from connectors).

running_count.description: Number of currently running upsert workflows

400.description: Bad Request. Missing or invalid parameters.

401.description: Unauthorized. Invalid or missing authentication token.

403.description: Forbidden. Only system keys can access this endpoint.

get.summary: Retrieve a document from a data source
get.description: Retrieve a document from a data source identified by {dsId} in the workspace identified by {wId}.

400.description: Bad Request. Missing or invalid parameters.

401.description: Unauthorized. Invalid or missing authentication token.

404.description: Data source or document not found.

post.summary: Upsert a document in a data source
post.description: Upsert a document in a data source in the workspace identified by {wId}.

title.description: The title of the document to upsert.

mime_type.description: The MIME type of the document to upsert.

text.description: The text content of the document to upsert.

source_url.description: The source URL for the document to upsert.

tags.description: Tags to associate with the document.

timestamp.description: Unix timestamp (in milliseconds) for the document (e.g. 1736365559000).

light_document_output.description: If true, a lightweight version of the document will be returned in the response (excluding the text, chunks and vectors). Defaults to false.

async.description: If true, the upsert operation will be performed asynchronously.

upsert_context.description: Additional context for the upsert operation.

400.description: Bad Request. Missing or invalid parameters.

401.description: Unauthorized. Invalid or missing authentication token.

403.description: Forbidden. The data source is managed.

404.description: Data source or document not found.

delete.description: Delete a document from a data source in the workspace identified by {wId}.

401.description: Unauthorized. Invalid or missing authentication token.

403.description: Forbidden. The data source is managed.

404.description: Data source or document not found.

parameters.name: wId
parameters.description: Unique string identifier for the workspace

parent_id.description: Direct parent ID of the document

parents.description: Document and ancestor ids, with the following convention: parents[0] === documentId, parents[1] === parentId, and then ancestors ids in order

400.description: Bad Request. Missing or invalid parameters.

401.description: Unauthorized. Invalid or missing authentication token.

404.description: Data source or workspace not found.

post.summary: Receive external webhook to trigger flows
post.description: Skeleton endpoint that verifies workspace and webhook source and logs receipt.

400.description: Invalid request

404.description: Workspace or webhook source not found

get.description: Get usage data for the workspace identified by {wId} in CSV or JSON format.

parameters.name: wId
parameters.description: Unique string identifier for the workspace

parameters.name: start
parameters.description: The start date in YYYY-MM or YYYY-MM-DD format

parameters.name: end
parameters.description: The end date in YYYY-MM or YYYY-MM-DD format (required when mode is 'range')

parameters.name: mode
parameters.description: The mode of date range selection

parameters.name: format
parameters.description: The output format of the data (defaults to 'csv')

parameters.name: table
parameters.description:
The name of the usage table to retrieve:
- "users": The list of users categorized by their activity level.
- "assistant_messages": The list of messages sent by users including the mentioned agents.
- "builders": The list of builders categorized by their activity level.
- "assistants": The list of workspace agents and their corresponding usage.
- "feedback": The list of feedback given by users on the agent messages.
- "all": A concatenation of all the above tables.

parameters.name: includeInactive
parameters.description: Include users and assistants with zero messages in the export (defaults to false)

200.description: The usage data in CSV or JSON format, or a ZIP of multiple CSVs if table is equal to "all"

400.description: Invalid request query

403.description: The workspace does not have access to the usage data API

get.description: Returns all agent configurations in the workspace.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of results to return

post.description: Creates a new agent configuration in the workspace.
Cancels the generation of messages in a conversation.
Post a new content fragment to an existing conversation.

get.description: Stream real-time conversation events using Server-Sent Events (SSE). This endpoint is redirected to /api/sse/ for SSE traffic routing.

200.description:
SSE event stream. Each event is sent as `data: {json}\n\n`.
Events are discriminated by the `type` field.

get.description: Retrieve all feedbacks for a conversation submitted by the authenticated user.
Retrieve a specific conversation by its ID.

delete.description: Delete a conversation or leave it if it is shared.

patch.description: Update a conversation's title, mark it as read, or move it to a different space.

post.description: Edit the content and mentions of an existing user message in a conversation.

get.description: Stream real-time events for a specific agent message using Server-Sent Events (SSE). Only available for agent messages. This endpoint is redirected to /api/sse/ for SSE traffic routing.

200.description:
SSE event stream. Each event is sent as `data: {json}\n\n`.
Events are discriminated by the `type` field. Each event payload also includes a `step` integer.

post.description: Create or update feedback (thumbs up/down) for a specific agent message.

post.description: Adds the authenticated user as a participant to a specific conversation.

200.description: File record created with upload URL

PrivateUser.description: Authenticated user with their workspaces and subscriber hash.

sId.description: Unique string identifier for the user

image.description: URL of the user's profile image

selectedWorkspace.description: sId of the currently selected workspace

origin.description: How the user joined (e.g. invitation, provisioned)

subscriberHash.description: Hash used for Intercom identity verification

PrivateWorkspace.description: Workspace as returned by the private API, includes SSO and provider settings.

PrivateConversation.description: Conversation without content, used in list responses.

actionRequired.description: Whether the conversation requires user action

spaceId.description: ID of the space the conversation belongs to (for project conversations)

PrivateFullConversation.description: Full conversation including content, owner, and visibility.

PrivateUserMessage.description: A user message in a conversation.

user.description: The user who sent the message

PrivateAgentMessage.description: An agent message in a conversation.

parentAgentMessageId.description: If handover, the agent message that summoned this agent

actions.description: MCP actions executed by the agent

PrivateLightAgentMessage.description: A lighter agent message used in paginated message list responses.

PrivateContentFragment.description: A content fragment (file or content node attachment) in a conversation.

contentFragmentType.description: Whether this is a file upload or a content node reference

PrivateLightAgentConfiguration.description: Agent configuration as returned by the private list endpoint.

lastAuthors.description: Optional, returned when withAuthors query param is set

editors.description: Optional, returned when withEditors query param is set

usage.description: Optional, returned when withUsage query param is set

feedbacks.description: Optional, returned when withFeedbacks query param is set

PrivateFileWithUploadUrl.description: File record with a pre-signed upload URL.

uploadUrl.description: Pre-signed URL for uploading the file content

PrivateProject.description: A project space with additional metadata.

PrivateDataSourceView.description: A view on a data source within a space.

parentsIn.description: List of parent IDs included in this view, null if the full data source is used

PrivateDataSource.description: A data source in the workspace.

PrivateMentionSuggestion.description: A rich mention suggestion for agents or users.

userFavorite.description: Whether the agent is a user favorite (agent mentions only)

feature_flags.description: List of enabled feature flag names for the workspace

blacklistedDomains.description: Domains where the extension should not activate

PrivateFeedback.description: User feedback on an agent message.

content.description: Optional text feedback from the user

PrivateMention.description: A mention in a message (agent or user).

PrivateRichMentionWithStatus.description: A rich mention with approval status, used in message responses.

PrivateUserMessageContext.description: Context metadata for a user message.

PrivateConversationEvent.description: Server-Sent Event for conversation-level streaming. Discriminated on the `type` field.

PrivateAgentMessageEvent.description: Server-Sent Event for agent message streaming. Discriminated on the `type` field. Each event also includes a `step` integer.

text.description: The token(s) generated in this chunk

delimiterClassification.description: Present when classification is opening_delimiter or closing_delimiter

action.description: The MCP action that completed successfully
The MCP action with its parameters

PrivateToolApproveExecutionEvent.description: Sent when a tool requires user approval before execution.

stake.description: Risk level of the tool execution

PrivateToolNotificationEvent.description: Progress notification from a running tool.

action.description: The MCP action producing the notification

PrivateToolPersonalAuthRequiredEvent.description: Sent when a tool requires personal OAuth authentication.

PrivateToolFileAuthRequiredEvent.description: Sent when a tool requires file access authorization (e.g., Google Drive).

Section.description: A section of a document that can contain nested sections

prefix.description: Optional prefix text for the section

content.description: Optional content text for the section

sId.description: Unique string identifier for the user

provider.description: Authentication provider used by the user

image.description: URL of the user's profile image

sId.description: Unique string identifier for the workspace

items.description: Feature flags enabled for the workspace

defaultEmbeddingProvider.description: Default provider for embeddings in the workspace

fullName.description: User's full name in the current context

email.description: User's email in the current context

profilePictureUrl.description: URL of the user's profile picture

sId.description: Unique string identifier for the agent configuration

versionCreatedAt.description: Timestamp of when the version was created

versionAuthorId.description: ID of the user who created this version

description.example: An AI agent designed to handle customer support inquiries

instructions.example: Always greet the customer politely and try to resolve their issue efficiently.

status.description: Current status of the agent configuration

userFavorite.description: Status of the user favorite for this configuration

templateId.description: ID of the template used for this configuration

sId.description: Unique string identifier for the conversation
Unique string identifier for the message

content.example: Hello, I need help with my order.

chainOfThought.description: Chain of thought for the message
chainOfThought.example: The user is asking about their order. I should first greet them and then ask for their order number.

content.example: Hello! I'd be happy to help you with your order. Could you please provide your order number?

configurationId.description: ID of the mentioned agent configuration

RichMention.description: A rich mention suggestion containing detailed information about an agent or user

id.description: Unique identifier for the mention (agent sId or user sId)

description.description: Description of the mention (agent description or user email)

userFavorite.description: Whether the agent is marked as a favorite by the user (only for agent mentions)

content.description: The content of the message. Should not be empty.

mentions.description: Empty array is accepted but won't trigger any agent.

title.description: The title of the content fragment

content.description: The content of the content fragment (optional if `fileId` is set)
content.example: This is my content fragment extracted text

contentType.description: The content type of the content fragment (optional if `fileId` is set)

url.description: The URL of the content fragment

fileId.description: The id of the previously uploaded file (optional if `content` and `contentType` are set)

nodeId.description: The id of the content node (optional if `content` and `contentType` are set)

nodeDataSourceViewId.description: The id of the data source view (optional if `content` and `contentType` are set)

sId.description: Unique string identifier for the space

groupIds.description: List of group IDs that have access to the space

createdAt.description: Timestamp of when the datasource was created

description.example: Contains all customer-related information and FAQs

dustAPIProjectId.description: ID of the associated Dust API project

connectorId.description: ID of the connector used for this datasource

assistantDefaultSelected.description: Whether this datasource is selected by default for agents

possible_values.description: Array of possible values for the column (null if unrestricted)

tags.description: Array of tags associated with the table

category.description: The category of the data source view

createdAt.description: Timestamp of when the data source view was created

editedByUser.description: The user who last edited the data source view

editedAt.description: Timestamp of when the data source view was last edited by the user

id.description: Unique identifier for the data source view

kind.description: The kind of the data source view

parentsIn.description: List of IDs included in this view, null if complete data source is taken

sId.description: Unique string identifier for the data source view

updatedAt.description: Timestamp of when the data source view was last updated

spaceId.description: ID of the space containing the data source view

specification_hash.description: The hash of the app specification

example.text: This is the first chunk of the document.
This is the second chunk of the document.

text.example: This is the full text content of the document. It contains multiple paragraphs and covers various topics related to customer support.

id.description: Unique identifier for the MCP server view

sId.description: Unique string identifier for the MCP server view

name.description: Custom name for the MCP server view (null if not set)

description.description: Custom description for the MCP server view (null if not set)
description.example: This MCP server handles customer data operations

createdAt.description: Unix timestamp of when the MCP server view was created

updatedAt.description: Unix timestamp of when the MCP server view was last updated

spaceId.description: ID of the space containing the MCP server view

sId.description: Unique string identifier for the MCP server

description.example: Handles customer data operations and queries

icon.description: Icon identifier for the MCP server

supported_use_cases.description: Supported use cases for the authorization

description.description: Description of what the tool does

inputSchema.description: JSON Schema for the tool's input parameters

availability.description: Availability status of the MCP server

allowMultipleInstances.description: Whether multiple instances of this server can be created

oAuthUseCase.description: OAuth use case for the MCP server view

editedByUser.description: Information about the user who last edited the MCP server view

editedAt.description: Unix timestamp of when the edit occurred

imageUrl.description: Profile image URL of the editor
